headline: 2 Services Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Avoid
summary: Business services providers use their specialized expertise to help enterprises streamline operations and cut costs. But increasing competition from AI-driven upstarts has tempered enthusiasm, and over the past six months, the industry has pulled back by 7.6%. This drawdown was disappointing since the S&P 500 held steady.
